title: Remove unused registry related options from libpod
body: We don't need to specify registries manually, as we have registries.conf for the system. These had never been wired up, so just tear them out.

comments.body: @baude All the podman-in-podman tests seem to be failing. I'm going to say unrelated, but still wierd

@mheon it isnt actually all of them ... its ones that are container related.  lets peak Monday. I did mark the podman in podman optional so we can merge without it passing but might be worth a couple of minutes of inspection.
@baude Yeah, I'm fine with not blocking on the podman-in-podman tests, just wanted you to be aware
